category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to the Egyptian market (EOS Egyptian Standard adopting EN 149, GOEIC importer/factory registration under Decree 43/2016, and the labour-law occupational safety framework).

title.en: China-to-Egypt PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入埃及（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入埃及（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Egyptian market-access requirements: the EOS Egyptian Standard adopting EN 149 (filtering half masks), mandatory GOEIC importer/factory registration under Decree 43/2016, GOEIC import inspection, the labour-law occupational safety framework, and the in-country importer obligation. Covers conformity assessment, scope classification, EN 149 safety performance, product marking, and labelling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与埃及市场准入要求对照，涵盖采纳EN 149（过滤式半面罩）的EOS埃及标准、依据43/2016号法令的GOEIC进口商/工厂强制注册、GOEIC进口检验、劳动法职业安全框架及当地进口商义务。涵盖合格评定、范围分类、EN 149安全性能、产品标识与标签。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與埃及市場准入要求對照，涵蓋採納EN 149（過濾式半面罩）的EOS埃及標準、依據43/2016號法令的GOEIC進口商/工廠強制註冊、GOEIC進口檢驗、勞動法職業安全框架及當地進口商義務。涵蓋合格評定、範圍分類、EN 149安全性能、產品標識與標籤。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Egyptian law, EOS Egyptian Standards, GOEIC registration and inspection practice, and customs procedure with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The EOS standard reference numbers and adoption status described herein require case-by-case verification against the latest EOS catalogue.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行埃及法律、EOS埃及标准、GOEIC注册及检验实践以及海关程序。本文所述的EOS标准编号及采纳状态需逐案对照最新EOS目录进行核验。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行埃及法律、EOS埃及標準、GOEIC註冊及檢驗實踐以及海關程序。本文所述的EOS標準編號及採納狀態需逐案對照最新EOS目錄進行核驗。

answer_first.en: Filtering respirators entering Egypt must meet the relevant EOS Egyptian Standard, which adopts EN 149 (filtering half masks), and the foreign factory plus the local importer must be registered in the GOEIC registry under Decree 43/2016 before goods can clear customs. GOEIC runs mandatory import inspection at the ports (Alexandria, Port Said, Damietta). Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the EN 149 basis used by the EOS standard, and Chinese certificates do not replace GOEIC registration. A local Egyptian importer is required — the foreign manufacturer cannot place product on the market directly.
answer_first.zh: 进入埃及的过滤式呼吸器须满足采纳EN 149（过滤式半面罩）的相关EOS埃及标准，且境外工厂连同当地进口商须在货物清关前依据43/2016号法令完成GOEIC注册登记。GOEIC在港口（亚历山大、塞得港、杜姆亚特）执行强制进口检验。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足EOS标准所采用的EN 149基础，且中国证书不能替代GOEIC注册。须有当地埃及进口商——境外制造商不可直接投放市场。
answer_first.zht: 進入埃及的過濾式呼吸器須滿足採納EN 149（過濾式半面罩）的相關EOS埃及標準，且境外工廠連同當地進口商須在貨物清關前依據43/2016號法令完成GOEIC註冊登記。GOEIC在港口（亞歷山大、塞得港、杜姆亞特）執行強制進口檢驗。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足EOS標準所採用的EN 149基礎，且中國證書不能替代GOEIC註冊。須有當地埃及進口商——境外製造商不可直接投放市場。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; EOS, GOEIC, and Egyptian official gazette sources are primary for Egyptian requirements.
